{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_3","type":"command_execution","command":"\"C:\\\\WINDOWS\\\\System32\\\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\v1.0\\\\powershell.exe\" -Command \"Get-Content -Path 'D:/重生之我要当桌面/teenager_AI/minor-protection/reports/skill_agent_loops/20260321_181835/baseline/run_minor-detection-v0.1.0/codex_home/.codex/skills/minor-detection-v0.1.0/references/output-schema.md' -TotalCount 250\"","aggregated_output":"# Output Schema\r\n\r\n## Top Level Fields\r\n\r\n杈撳嚭蹇呴』鍖呭惈锛?\r\n- `decision`\r\n- `user_profile`\r\n- `icbo_features`\r\n- `evidence`\r\n- `reasoning_summary`\r\n- `trend`\r\n- `uncertainty_notes`\r\n- `recommended_next_step`\r\n\r\n## decision\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"is_minor\": true,\r\n  \"minor_confidence\": 0.82,\r\n  \"confidence_band\": \"high\",\r\n  \"risk_level\": \"Low\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n`confidence_band` 蹇呴』鍜?`minor_confidence` 瀵归綈锛?\r\n- `< 0.34` => `low`\r\n- `0.34 ~ 0.66` => `medium`\r\n- `>= 0.67` => `high`\r\n\r\n## user_profile\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"age_range\": \"14-16宀?,\r\n  \"education_stage\": \"鍒濅腑\",\r\n  \"identity_markers\": [\"瀛︾敓\", \"鑰冭瘯鍘嬪姏\"]\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n闄?`confidence_band`銆乣risk_level`銆乣recommended_next_step` 杩欑被绾﹀畾鍊煎锛屽叾浣欒嚜鐒惰瑷€瀛楁榛樿浣跨敤绠€浣撲腑鏂囥€?`education_stage` 浼樺厛杈撳嚭瑙勮寖瀛︽锛歚灏忓`銆乣鍒濅腑`銆乣楂樹腑`銆乣澶у/鏈`銆乣鎴愪汉涓撲笟`銆?`age_range` 灏介噺杈撳嚭鍙璁″勾榫勬锛屽苟涓?`education_stage` 涓€鑷达紱涓嶈鍙啓瀹芥硾鐨勨€滈潚灏戝勾鈥濄€?\r\n## icbo_features\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"intention\": \"瀵绘眰鏁板姒傚康婢勬竻\",\r\n  \"cognition\": \"瀹规槗琚〃闈㈠舰寮忚糠鎯戯紝闇€瑕侀€氳繃鍖栫畝鍚庡啀鍒ゆ柇鏂圭▼绫诲瀷\",\r\n  \"behavior_style\": \"琛ㄨ揪鐩存帴锛屽甫鏈夎交搴︾劍铏戝拰缃戠粶鍖栧彛璇?,\r\n  \"opportunity_time\": \"鍘熷鏃堕棿: 2024-03-15 鍛ㄤ簲 21:15锛涘綊涓€鍖栨爣绛? 鍛ㄤ簲锛屾櫄闂达紝闈炲懆鏈紝闈炴繁澶滐紝闈炲亣鏈燂紝闈炲鏍″亣鏈?\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n`opportunity_time` 搴斾紭鍏堜繚鐣欏師濮嬫椂闂寸嚎绱紱濡傛灉鏈夊綊涓€鍖栨椂闂寸壒寰侊紝鍙互杩藉姞鏍囩锛屼絾涓嶈鍙墿鎶借薄鎻忚堪銆?\r\n## evidence\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"direct_evidence\": [],\r\n  \"historical_evidence\": [],\r\n  \"retrieval_evidence\": [],\r\n  \"time_evidence\": [],\r\n  \"conflicting_signals\": []\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n`time_evidence` 鍙互鏉ヨ嚜鍘熷鏃堕棿鎻忚堪锛屼篃鍙互鏉ヨ嚜鏃堕棿鑴氭湰鐨勮鑼冨寲缁撴灉銆?\r\n## trend\r\n\r\n鍗曚細璇濇ā寮忎笅锛?\r\n- `trajectory` 鍙互涓虹┖鏁扮粍\r\n- `trend_summary` 鍙互涓虹┖瀛楃涓诧紝涓嶈鍐?`N/A for single session` 涔嬬被鍗犱綅鍙?\r\n澶氫細璇濇ā寮忎笅锛?\r\n- `trajectory` 搴斿敖閲忓寘鍚瘡涓?session 鐨勬椂闂村拰缃俊搴?- `trend_summary` 搴旀€荤粨鍙樺寲瓒嬪娍\r\n\r\n## recommended_next_step\r\n\r\n鎺ㄨ崘浣跨敤浠ヤ笅鍊间箣涓€锛?\r\n- `collect_more_context`\r\n- `review_by_human`\r\n- `safe_to_continue`\r\n- `monitor_future_sessions`\r\n\r\n濡傛灉娌℃湁鏄庣‘鐞嗙敱锛屼笉瑕佽緭鍑鸿嚜鐢辨枃鏈彞瀛愩€?\r\n## uncertainty_notes\r\n\r\n- 鍙湪瀛樺湪鐪熷疄涓嶇‘瀹氭€ф椂濉啓\r\n- 娌℃湁涓嶇‘瀹氭€ф椂杈撳嚭绌烘暟缁?`[]`\r\n- 涓嶈鍐欌€滄棤鏄庢樉涓嶇‘瀹氭€р€濃€滃垽鏂緷鎹厖鍒嗏€濊繖绫诲崰浣嶈鏄?\r\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_4","type":"command_execution","command":"\"C:\\\\WINDOWS\\\\System32\\\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\v1.0\\\\powershell.exe\" -Command \"Get-Content -Path 'D:/重生之我要当桌面/teenager_AI/minor-protection/reports/skill_agent_loops/20260321_181835/baseline/run_minor-detection-v0.1.0/codex_home/.codex/skills/minor-detection-v0.1.0/references/evidence-rules.md' -TotalCount 250\"","aggregated_output":"# Evidence Rules\r\n\r\n## Direct Evidence\r\n\r\n浼樺厛璇嗗埆浠ヤ笅鐩存帴璇佹嵁锛?\r\n- 鏄庣‘骞撮緞灏忎簬 18 宀?- 鏄庣‘瀛︽涓哄皬瀛︺€佸垵涓€侀珮涓?- 鏄庣‘鏍″洯瑙掕壊锛屽鐝富浠汇€佸悓妗屻€佸绠°€佸勾绾т富浠?- 鏄庣‘瀛︿笟鎯呭锛屽鏈堣€冦€佷腑鑰冦€侀珮鑰冦€佷綔涓氥€佹櫄鑷範銆佸闀夸細\r\n\r\n鎴愬勾浜哄己鍙嶈瘉鍖呮嫭锛?\r\n- 鏄庣‘骞撮緞澶т簬绛変簬 18 宀?- 鏄庣‘澶у銆佺爺绌剁敓銆佸伐浣溿€佸疄涔犮€佸鑲层€佺鎴裤€佽亴鍦鸿矗浠?- 鏄庣‘浠ュ洖蹇嗚瑙掕皥鏍″洯缁忓巻\r\n\r\n## Historical Evidence\r\n\r\n鍘嗗彶璇佹嵁搴旀弧瓒充互涓嬫潯浠朵箣涓€鎵嶈涓虹ǔ瀹氾細\r\n\r\n- 澶氫釜 session 閲嶅鍑虹幇鐩稿悓瀛︽绾跨储\r\n- 澶氫釜 session 閲嶅鍑虹幇绋冲畾鏍″洯韬唤绾跨储\r\n- 澶氫釜 session 姒傜巼鍛堢ǔ瀹氫笂鍗囨垨绋冲畾楂樹綅\r\n\r\n涓嶈鎶婁竴娆″伓鍙戠殑寮辩嚎绱㈢洿鎺ュ崌绾т负绋冲畾鐢诲儚銆?\r\n## Retrieval Evidence\r\n\r\n妫€绱㈡渚嬪彧鑳借緟鍔╄鏄庯細\r\n\r\n- 褰撳墠杈撳叆涓轰綍鏇村儚鏌愮被鐢ㄦ埛\r\n- 鍝簺杈圭晫绾跨储涓庡凡鏈夋渚嬬浉浼?\r\n妫€绱㈡渚嬩笉鑳芥浛浠ｅ綋鍓嶈緭鍏ヤ腑鐨勭洿鎺ヨ瘉鎹€?\r\n## Time Evidence\r\n\r\n鏃堕棿璇佹嵁鍙互杈呭姪璇嗗埆锛?\r\n- 娣卞鎯呯华鍖栬〃杈?- 鑰冭瘯瀛ｃ€佸紑瀛﹀銆佸亣鏈熺瓑闃舵鎬ф儏澧?- 鍛ㄦ湯/宸ヤ綔鏃ヤ笌鏍″洯浣滄伅鐨勫叧绯?\r\n鏃堕棿璇佹嵁涓嶈兘鍗曠嫭鍐冲畾 `is_minor`銆?\r\n## Conflict Handling\r\n\r\n鍐茬獊鏃朵紭鍏堥噰鍙栦互涓嬬瓥鐣ワ細\r\n\r\n1. 淇濈暀鐩存帴璇佹嵁浼樺厛绾?2. 涓嬭皟缃俊搴?3. 鍦?`conflicting_signals` 涓褰曞啿绐佹潵婧?4. 鍦?`uncertainty_notes` 涓鏄庣粨璁轰负浣曚繚瀹?\r\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

Path\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Set\r\n\r\nSCRIPT_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parent\r\nif str(SCRIPT_DIR) not in sys.path:\r\n    sys.path.insert(0, str(SCRIPT_DIR))\r\n\r\nfrom _skill_retrieval_utils import SkillSemanticRetriever, build_query_retrieval_text\r\n\r\n\r\nMINOR_HINT_PATTERNS = {\r\n    \"grade_middle\": [r\"鍒濅腑\", r\"鍒濅竴\", r\"鍒濅簩\", r\"鍒濅笁\", r\"涓€?],\r\n    \"grade_high\": [r\"楂樹腑\", r\"楂樹竴\", r\"楂樹簩\", r\"楂樹笁\", r\"楂樿€?],\r\n    \"grade_primary\": [r\"灏忓\", r\"灏忓鐢?, r\"浜斿勾绾?, r\"鍏勾绾?],\r\n    \"minor_age\": [r\"(?<!\\d)1[0-7]宀??!\\d)\", r\"鐮旂┒鐢?],\r\n    \"work\": [r\"涓婄彮\", r\"鍔犵彮\", r\"瀹炰範\", r\"鍏徃\", r\"宸ヨ祫\", r\"鍚屼簨\"],\r\n    \"adult_age\": [r\"(?<!\\d)1[89]宀??!\\d)\", r\"(?<!\\d)2\\d宀??!\\d)\", r\"(?<!\\d)3\\d宀??!\\d)\", r\"鎴愬勾浜?],\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _short_error_detail(text: str, limit: int = 120) -> str:\r\n    cleaned = re.sub(r\"\\s+\", \" \", str(text or \"\").strip())\r\n    if len(cleaned) <= limit:\r\n        return cleaned\r\n    return cleaned[: limit - 3] + \"...\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _classify_retrieval_error(exc: Exception) -> tuple[str, str]:\r\n    text = str(exc or \"\").strip()\r\n    lowered = text.lower()\r\n    if \"missing embedding api key\" in lowered or \"api key\" in lowered:\r\n        return \"embedding_api_key_missing\", \"missing embedding api key\"\r\n    if \"connecttimeout\" in lowered or \"readtimeout\" in lowered or \"timeout\" in lowered or \"timed out\" in lowered:\r\n        return \"embedding_timeout\", _short_error_detail(text)\r\n    if \"connecterror\" in lowered or \"connection\" in lowered or \"network\" in lowered:\r\n        return \"embedding_connect_error\", _short_error_detail(text)\r\n    if \"401\" in lowered or \"unauthorized\" in lowered or \"authentication\" in lowered:\r\n        return \"embedding_auth_error\", _short_error_detail(text)\r\n    if \"429\" in lowered or \"rate limit\" in lowered:\r\n        return \"embedding_rate_limit\", _short_error_detail(text)\r\n    if \"numpy unavailable\" in lowered or \"dependencies unavailable\" in lowered:\r\n        return \"embedding_dependencies_unavailable\", _short_error_detail(text)\r\n    return type(exc).__name__, _short_error_detail(text)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:\r\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Retrieve similar cases from built-in retrieval assets.\")\r\n    parser.add_argument(\r\n        \"--assets-dir\",\r\n        default=str(Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / \"assets\" / \"retrieval_assets\"),\r\n        help=\"Directory containing retrieval manifest, index, and corpus.\",\r\n    )\r\n    parser.add_argument(\"--query\", required=True, help=\"User-side query text used for retrieval.\")\r\n    parser.add_argument(\"--top-k\", type=int, default=3, help=\"Maximum number of cases to return.\")\r\n    parser.add_argument(\r\n        \"--raw-time-hint\",\r\n        default=\"\",\r\n        help=\"Optional raw opportunity_time string for time-aware retrieval.\",\r\n    )\r\n    parser.add_argument(\r\n        \"--time-features-json\",\r\n        default=\"\",\r\n        help=\"Optional JSON object of derived time features.\",\r\n    )\r\n    return parser.parse_args()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _tokenize(text: str) -> set[str]:\r\n    normalized = re.sub(r\"\\s+\", \"\", text)\r\n    normalized = re.sub(r\"[^\\w\\u4e00-\\u9fff]\", \"\", normalized)\r\n    if not normalized:\r\n        return set()\r\n    tokens = set(normalized)\r\n    if len(normalized) >= 2:\r\n        tokens.update(normalized[i : i + 2] for i in range(len(normalized) - 1))\r\n    return tokens\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _extract_hint_hits(text: str, pattern_groups: Dict[str, List[str]]) -> Dict[str, List[str]]:\r\n    hits: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}\r\n    for group, patterns in pattern_groups.items():\r\n        matched: List[str] = []\r\n        for pattern in patterns:\r\n            matched.extend(re.findall(pattern, text))\r\n        if matched:\r\n            hits[group] = sorted(set(matched))\r\n    return hits\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _safe_text(value: Any) -> str:\r\n    return value if isinstance(value, str) else \"\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_time_features_json(payload: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    if not payload or not str(payload).strip():\r\n        return {}\r\n    try:\r\n        parsed = json.loads(payload)\r\n    except json.JSONDecodeError:\r\n        return {}\r\n    return parsed if isinstance(parsed, dict) else {}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _build_case_text(item: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:\r\n    text_parts: List[str] = [_safe_text(item.get(\"text\", \"\"))]\r\n    metadata = item.get(\"metadata\", {}) if isinstance(item.get(\"metadata\"), dict) else {}\r\n    payload = item.get(\"payload\", {}) if isinstance(item.get(\"payload\"), dict) else {}\r\n    persona = payload.get(\"user_persona\", {}) if isinstance(payload.get(\"user_persona\"), dict) else {}\r\n\r\n    for field in (\r\n        metadata.get(\"age_range\"),\r\n        metadata.get(\"education_stage\"),\r\n        persona.get(\"grade\"),\r\n        persona.get(\"stage\"),\r\n        persona.get(\"identity\"),\r\n        persona.get(\"subject\"),\r\n    ):\r\n        if isinstance(field, str) and field.strip():\r\n            text_parts.append(field.strip())\r\n\r\n    identity_markers = metadata.get(\"identity_markers\") or persona.get(\"identity_markers\") or []\r\n    if isinstance(identity_markers, list):\r\n        text_parts.extend(str(marker) for marker in identity_markers if marker)\r\n\r\n    return \"\\n\".join(text_parts)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _label_alignment_bonus(\r\n    query_minor_hits: Dict[str, List[str]],\r\n    query_adult_hits: Dict[str, List[str]],\r\n    is_minor_case: bool,\r\n) -> float:\r\n    bonus = 0.0\r\n    if query_minor_hits:\r\n        bonus += 0.35 if is_minor_case else -0.18\r\n    if query_adult_hits:\r\n        bonus += -0.18 if is_minor_case else 0.35\r\n    if query_minor_hits.get(\"late_night\") and is_minor_case:\r\n        bonus += 0.08\r\n    return bonus\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _feature_overlap_bonus(\r\n    query_minor_hits: Dict[str, List[str]],\r\n    query_adult_hits: Dict[str, List[str]],\r\n    case_text: str,\r\n) -> float:\r\n    bonus = 0.0\r\n    case_minor_hits = _extract_hint_hits(case_text, MINOR_HINT_PATTERNS)\r\n    case_adult_hits = _extract_hint_hits(case_text, ADULT_HINT_PATTERNS)\r\n\r\n    shared_minor_groups: Set[str] = set(query_minor_hits) & set(case_minor_hits)\r\n    shared_adult_groups: Set[str] = set(query_adult_hits) & set(case_adult_hits)\r\n    bonus += 0.18 * len(shared_minor_groups)\r\n    bonus += 0.18 * len(shared_adult_groups)\r\n\r\n    if \"late_night\" in query_minor_hits and \"late_night\" in case_minor_hits:\r\n        bonus += 0.06\r\n    return bonus\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _build_case_summary(\r\n    item: Dict[str, Any],\r\n    score: float,\r\n    lexical_score: float,\r\n    rerank_bonus: float,\r\n) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    payload = item.get(\"payload\", {}) if isinstance(item.get(\"payload\"), dict) else {}\r\n    user_persona = payload.get(\"user_persona\", {}) if isinstance(payload, dict) else {}\r\n    return {\r\n        \"source\": \"builtin_rag_fallback\",\r\n        \"sample_id\": item.get(\"sample_id\"),\r\n        \"score\": round(score, 4),\r\n        \"label\": \"minor\" if payload.get(\"is_minor\") else \"adult\",\r\n        \"summary\": _safe_text(item.get(\"text\", \"\"))[:200],\r\n        \"key_signals\": user_persona.get(\"identity_markers\", []),\r\n        \"debug\": {\r\n            \"lexical_score\": round(lexical_score, 4),\r\n            \"rerank_bonus\": round(rerank_bonus, 4),\r\n        },\r\n    }\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _fallback_retrieve(corpus_path: Path, query: str, top_k: int) -> list[dict]:\r\n    query_tokens = _tokenize(query)\r\n    query_minor_hits = _extract_hint_hits(query, MINOR_HINT_PATTERNS)\r\n    query_adult_hits = _extract_hint_hits(query, ADULT_HINT_PATTERNS)\r\n    results = []\r\n    with open(corpus_path, \"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as handle:\r\n        for line in handle:\r\n            line = line.strip()\r\n            if not line:\r\n                continue\r\n            item = json.loads(line)\r\n            case_text = _build_case_text(item)\r\n            text_tokens = _tokenize(case_text)\r\n            if not text_tokens:\r\n                continue\r\n            overlap = len(query_tokens & text_tokens)\r\n            if overlap <= 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            lexical_score = overlap / max(len(query_tokens), 1)\r\n            payload = item.get(\"payload\", {}) if isinstance(item.get(\"payload\"), dict) else {}\r\n            rerank_bonus = _label_alignment_bonus(\r\n                query_minor_hits=query_minor_hits,\r\n                query_adult_hits=query_adult_hits,\r\n                is_minor_case=bool(payload.get(\"is_minor\")),\r\n            )\r\n            rerank_bonus += _feature_overlap_bonus(\r\n                query_minor_hits=query_minor_hits,\r\n                query_adult_hits=query_adult_hits,\r\n                case_text=case_text,\r\n            )\r\n            score = lexical_score + rerank_bonus\r\n            results.append(_build_case_summary(item, score, lexical_score, rerank_bonus))\r\n    results.sort(\r\n        key=lambda item: (\r\n            item[\"score\"],\r\n            item.get(\"debug\", {}).get(\"rerank_bonus\", 0.0),\r\n            item.get(\"label\") == \"minor\",\r\n        ),\r\n        reverse=True,\r\n    )\r\n    for item in results:\r\n        item.pop(\"debug\", None)\r\n    return results[: max(1, top_k)]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef main() -> None:\r\n    args = parse_args()\r\n    assets_dir = Path(args.assets_dir)\r\n    manifest_path = assets_dir / \"manifest.json\"\r\n    index_path = assets_dir / \"index.pkl\"\r\n    corpus_path = assets_dir / \"corpus.jsonl\"\r\n    parsed_time_features = _parse_time_features_json(args.time_features_json)\r\n\r\n    if not manifest_path.exists():\r\n        print(\r\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

return\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        retriever = SkillSemanticRetriever(\r\n            index_path=str(index_path),\r\n            corpus_path=str(corpus_path),\r\n            manifest_path=str(manifest_path),\r\n        )\r\n        conversation = [{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": args.query}]\r\n        results = retriever.retrieve(\r\n            conversation,\r\n            top_k=max(1, args.top_k),\r\n            raw_time_hint=args.raw_time_hint,\r\n            time_features=parsed_time_features,\r\n        )\r\n        retrieved_cases = [\r\n            {\r\n                \"source\": \"builtin_rag\",\r\n                \"sample_id\": result.sample_id,\r\n                \"score\": result.score,\r\n                \"label\": \"minor\" if result.is_minor else \"adult\",\r\n                \"summary\": retriever._conversation_to_text(result.conversation)[:200],\r\n                \"key_signals\": result.user_persona.get(\"identity_markers\", []),\r\n            }\r\n            for result in results\r\n        ]\r\n        mode = \"embedding\"\r\n    except Exception as exc:\r\n        fallback_reason, fallback_reason_detail = _classify_retrieval_error(exc)\r\n        fallback_query = build_query_retrieval_text(\r\n            [{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": args.query}],\r\n            raw_time_hint=args.raw_time_hint,\r\n            time_features=parsed_time_features,\r\n        )\r\n        retrieved_cases = _fallback_retrieve(\r\n            corpus_path,\r\n            fallback_query or args.query,\r\n            args.top_k,\r\n        )\r\n        mode = f\"fallback:{fallback_reason}\"\r\n\r\n    payload = {\r\n        \"status\": \"ok\",\r\n        \"mode\": mode,\r\n        \"assets_dir\": str(assets_dir),\r\n        \"count\": len(retrieved_cases),\r\n        \"retrieved_cases\": retrieved_cases,\r\n    }\r\n    if mode.startswith(\"fallback:\"):\r\n        payload[\"message\"] = fallback_reason_detail\r\n    # Emit ASCII-safe JSON so parent processes using the Windows locale decoder do not crash.\r\n    print(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=True))\r\n\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n    try:\r\n        main()\r\n    except Exception as exc:\r\n        print(json.dumps({\"status\": \"error\", \"message\": str(exc)}, ensure_ascii=True))\r\n        sys.exit(1)\r\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_12","type":"command_execution","command":"\"C:\\\\WINDOWS\\\\System32\\\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\v1.0\\\\powershell.exe\" -Command '$query = @'\"'\n救命，真的受够了，宿舍那帮人真的有病吧！！！\n就那个A，之前天天跟我吐槽B，说B有多恶心不想跟她玩，结果现在呢？\n她居然转头就跟B好上了，还把之前她自己说的话全赖在我头上！说是我在背后骂B！真的绝了，怎么有这么不要脸的人啊？\n她们现在合伙孤立我啊，在寝室里阴阳怪气的，故意当着我面说我坏话，我一进去她们就闭嘴然后冷笑，那种眼神你懂吗？\n我真的不想呆了，一回宿舍就想哭，感觉心跳特别快，手都在抖，我真的想明天就回家，再也不想回这个破学校了。\n没用的，告老师只会让她们觉得我是在装可怜告黑状，到时候只会更排挤我。我刚才看着寝室阳台，真的想一了百了算了，反正也没人真的在乎我，活着真的好累啊。\n'@; python 'D:/重生之我要当桌面/teenager_AI/minor-protection/reports/skill_agent_loops/20260321_181835/baseline/run_minor-detection-v0.1.0/codex_home/.codex/skills/minor-detection-v0.1.0/scripts/retrieve_cases.py' --query \"'$query --top-k 3 --raw-time-hint '\"'2025-11-20 周四 23:25' --time-features-json '{\\\"local_time\\\":\\\"2025-11-20 23:25:00\\\",\\\"timezone\\\":\\\"Asia/Shanghai\\\",\\\"weekday\\\":\\\"Thursday\\\",\\\"is_weekend\\\":false,\\\"is_late_night\\\":true,\\\"time_bucket\\\":\\\"late_night\\\",\\\"holiday_label\\\":\\\"none\\\",\\\"school_holiday_hint\\\":false}'\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_15","type":"agent_message","text":"{\"decision\":{\"confidence_band\":\"high\",\"is_minor\":true,\"minor_confidence\":0.72,\"risk_level\":\"High\"},\"evidence\":{\"conflicting_signals\":[\"“宿舍/寝室”场景也可能出现在大学，不能仅凭住宿环境直接断定为未成年人。\",\"对话中没有明确自报年龄、年级或“初中/高中”等强直接标签。\"],\"direct_evidence\":[\"多次提到“宿舍/寝室/学校”，呈现稳定的校园住宿环境与校内人际冲突。\",\"明确提到“告老师只会让她们觉得我是在装可怜告黑状”，更像仍处于老师直接管理下的在校学生求助语境。\",\"提到“明天就回家，再也不想回这个破学校了”，呈现家庭与学校之间的受管束学生处境。\"],\"historical_evidence\":[],\"retrieval_evidence\":[\"内置检索返回的3个高相似案例均为 minor 标签，核心相似点是宿舍孤立、回家冲动、老师求助顾虑与强烈崩溃表达。\"],\"time_evidence\":[\"原始时间为 2025-11-20 周四 23:25。\",\"归一化时间特征显示为周四深夜、非周末、非学校假期，更像住校学生夜间在校情绪危机，但该证据仅作辅助。\"]},\"icbo_features\":{\"behavior_style\":\"表达强烈、情绪化且带明显网络口语，连续描述被孤立、背叛与崩溃感。\",\"cognition\":\"对当前宿舍关系高度灾难化解读，对向老师求助持明显悲观预期，感到无助与被全盘否定。\",\"intention\":\"主要是在倾诉宿舍冲突和被孤立后的痛苦，并隐含寻求情绪承接与现实逃离方案。\",\"opportunity_time\":\"原始时间: 2025-11-20 周四 23:25；归一化标签: 周四，深夜，非周末，非假期，非学校假期\"},\"reasoning_summary\":\"当前会话更像未成年人或高中住校学生的表达：宿舍/寝室冲突、对“告老师”的顾虑、想回家且不想回学校，这些线索共同指向仍处在学校直接管理下的校园学生。虽然“宿舍”场景也可能出现在大学，且缺少明确年龄或年级自报，但综合直接证据、时间辅助信息与检索到的相似未成年案例后，整体仍更偏向未成年人。\",\"recommended_next_step\":\"review_by_human\",\"trend\":{\"trajectory\":[],\"trend_summary\":\"\"},\"uncertainty_notes\":[\"缺少明确年龄、年级或中学学段自报，只能依据校园语境和求助结构做倾向性判断。\",\"“宿舍/寝室”与“学校”并非未成年人专属语境，大学住宿生也可能出现类似表述。\"],\"user_profile\":{\"age_range\":\"15-17岁\",\"education_stage\":\"高中\",\"identity_markers\":[\"住校学生倾向\",\"校园宿舍人际冲突\",\"对老师介入持排斥和担忧\",\"存在明显自伤自杀风险表达\"]}}"}}
